response: {"commands":[{"command_template":"hiSeqDemultiplex.py {raw_fastq}","description":"Standard Illumina HiSeq demultiplexing of raw FASTQ reads from sequencing","required_inputs":["Raw FASTQ reads from HiSeq sequencing"],"outputs":["Demultiplexed FASTQ reads"],"parameters":{}},{"command_template":"inline_barcode_demux.py {demultiplexed_fastq} --append-umi","description":"In-house inline barcode demultiplexing of eCLIP libraries with random-mer (UMI) appended to the read name for later use","required_inputs":["Demultiplexed FASTQ reads"],"outputs":["Demultiplexed FASTQ reads with random-mer appended to read names"],"parameters":{"--append-umi":"appends random-mer (UMI) to read name"}}]}
